title: Planned water outage: Bos en Dal
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water...
bodyText:
[{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The water outage is due to the commissioning of a newly constructed water reticulation network at Lang Street, Bos en Dal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water outage on Tuesday 3 February from 10:00 to 18:00 facilitate construction work.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water outage on Tuesday 3 February from 10:00 to 18:00 facilitate construction work."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The following areas will be affected:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lang StreetBos en Dal","html":"
  • Lang Street
  • Bos en Dal
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the event of any unforeseen circumstances that delay the planned work, the water outage will be rescheduled to Wednesday 4 February from 10:00 to 18:00.","html":"In the event of any unforeseen circumstances that delay the planned work, the water outage will be rescheduled to Wednesday 4 February from 10:00 to 18:00."}]
